Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time spent in Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the time spent in Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful payment variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to be performed after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that do not contain any rejection activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE does not occur

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Request Payment in cases that avoid rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in rejected variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants where the budget owner and supervisor are different roles versus when they are the same
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of org:role

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING occurs

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that loop back due to prior rejections
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Payment Handled in successful end-to-end variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time until Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER is performed in cases that never encounter a PRE_APPROVER rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'
